services.label: IN SCOPE
services.heading: What we hit
services.intro: Design, code, cloud and sound, one crosshair. Built for brands that want every shot to land online.

journey.label: THE JOURNEY
journey.heading: From brief to bullseye
journey.intro: Six chapters on one route. Every discipline is a waypoint — design, build, deploy, sound, motion, brand — until your project lands on target.

cta.label: NEXT TARGET
cta.heading: Ready to lock in?
cta.subtext: From briefing to launch, we keep the full journey in scope.

items.title: Web Design
items.desc: Visual concepts, design systems and interfaces with crosshair precision. Dark, sharp and considered down to the last detail.

items.title: Web Development
items.desc: Custom websites and web apps with Nuxt, Vue and modern tooling. Fast, scalable, locked in on performance.

items.title: Cloud & Hosting
items.desc: Deploy, CDN, image optimisation and secure environments, so your site loads on target anywhere in the world.

items.title: Sound Design
items.desc: Audio identity for brands and labels, from subtle UI feedback to soundscapes that bring your site on target.

items.title: Motion & Interaction
items.desc: Scroll animations, page transitions and micro-interactions with GSAP. Motion with intent, never decoration.

items.title: Brand & Strategy
items.desc: Visual identity, tone of voice and digital brand experience, consistent across website, socials and campaigns.
